title: adenostyles viridis subsp. australis
intro: Adenostyles viridis subsp. australis, also known as New Zealand chrysanthemum daisy or New Zealand hawk's beard, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Adenostyles viridis subsp. australis include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as potentially lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems and skin conditions.
